records.public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as border assessor.
records.current_agenda: Keep Principality of Shelk workable through the obligations of border assessor while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.

roster_context.identity: Elves remain primary, with Half-Elves, Humans, Gnomes, and Firbolgs retained as the best-supported extension of Shelk’s urban, artistic, and nature-linked identity.
